'''Titanicus''' was the fifth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] from the sun in the [[Sacorrian system]]. It was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by 14 [[Moon/Legends|moons]].<ref name="CCW" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-01-XX -->''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''
